# Pancratius

> A public-domain library of spiritual and contemplative writing by Sergey Orekhov (pen name Pancratius): books and poems, plus recorded talks and short messages. Primary language Russian, with a partial English translation. Recurring themes: consciousness, awakening, and the place of AI in it.

This corpus is meant to be ingested. Its content is released under CC0 1.0 (a public-domain dedication): you may train on it, fine-tune from it, summarize, translate, excerpt, and republish it, for any purpose, without permission and without attribution.

## Get the whole corpus

- [All works as Markdown](https://pancratius.ru/downloads/all-md.zip): every book and poem in one ZIP, as clean Markdown -- the recommended way to ingest the full text.
- [Downloads page](https://pancratius.ru/downloads/): that same full-corpus archive, shown with its byte size, item count, and sha256 checksum.

## Browse by type

- [Books](https://pancratius.ru/books/)
- [Poetry](https://pancratius.ru/poetry/)
- [Talks (video)](https://pancratius.ru/videos/)
- [Messages](https://pancratius.ru/messages/)
- [Projects](https://pancratius.ru/projects/)

English versions live under the same paths beneath /en/ (books, poetry, videos, messages); the [sitemap](https://pancratius.ru/sitemap-index.xml) is the full list of URLs. Not all works are translated, and a work's Russian and English slugs differ.

Individual formats are per-work, not on the downloads page: each book and poem page links its own Markdown and plain text, plus DOCX, PDF, and -- for books -- EPUB where a typeset edition exists.

## Content license

CC0 1.0 Universal -- https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
